title: HTTP API Resources, Representations, Errors, and Handler Layers · Runtime Contract: Feed Go Problem Responses
summary: Routes mirror tables, handlers parse, query, and render directly, status codes are ad hoc, response shapes drift, and request cancellation never reaches storage. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
